GAURAV MAHALE
+91 9923540336 • mahalegauravk@gmail.com • LinkedIn Profile • Portfolio Website • GitHub Link • Pune
SUMMARY .
AI Product Builder | Finance Domain Expert with 9+ years in corporate banking, credit risk, and portfolio management.
Independently designed, built, and shipped multiple LLM-based platforms using Claude, Cursor and Groq API.
Experienced across the full product lifecycle: problem discovery, MVP scoping, prompt engineering, stakeholder
alignment, and iterative releases. Seeking AI Product Management roles where finance expertise and practical AI-
building experience combine to create transformative products.
SKILLS .
AI/Product: Generative AI (LLMs), RAG, Fine-tuning, Prompt Engineering, MVP Development, PRD Writing, Product
Roadmapping, OKRs, KPIs, Agile/Scrum, A/B Testing, User Story Mapping, Stakeholder Management, Go-to-Market
Strategy, Product Analytics
Domain: Corporate Credit Analysis, Credit Risk Assessment, Portfolio Management, Financial Modelling, NPA
Resolution, Restructuring, Due Diligence, Regulatory Compliance, Fintech
Technical: Python, Next.js, SQL, Supabase, FastAPI, API Integration, Claude Code, Groq API, PowerBI, Google Analytics,
GitHub, Vercel, Gemini API
EXPERIENCE .
AI Trainer | Pareto.AI (Part-time) Dec 2025 – Present
• Train and fine-tune Large Language Models on financial modelling, document generation, and presentation
creation through structured evaluation (evals) and prompt engineering.
• Evaluate and iteratively improve AI outputs for corporate credit analysis, financial projections, and business
documentation against expert benchmarks.
• Apply banking domain expertise to enhance LLM accuracy in corporate finance tasks, bridging the gap between
raw model capability and real-world financial workflows.
Relationship Manager | Yes Bank Limited Apr 2022 – Present
• Drove annual revenue of ~₹2.5 Cr and acquired ~4 new corporate clients per year across education, steel, textile,
safety equipment, and gems & jewellery sectors by defining a structured client engagement and onboarding model.
• Defined credit proposals and authored comprehensive Credit Appraisal Memorandums (CAMs) and term sheets
for portfolios worth ₹500 Cr+, synthesising financial analysis, risk assessment, and industry research to support
senior leadership decisions.
• Validated borrower needs through structured discovery — identifying pain points across working capital, term
loans, and trade finance — and translated insights into tailored product proposals.
• Shipped lending solutions end-to-end by prioritising milestones and aligning credit, legal, compliance, and
operations stakeholders from origination to disbursement.
• Reduced delinquency risk by building early-warning monitoring frameworks post-disbursement; drove proactive
client engagement to improve portfolio retention and health.
Portfolio Manager | HDFC Bank Limited Jan 2020 – Apr 2022
• Designed data-driven solutions to minimise delinquency risk using predictive analytics and early warning signals,
reducing portfolio stress across Maharashtra and Goa.
• Built and maintained PowerBI and Excel dashboards to track default probabilities, portfolio health, and loan
concentration risk — enabling real-time decision-making for senior management.
• Created sector-specific credit and financial models for real estate, energy, and hospitality segments, enabling faster
and more accurate underwriting decisions across diverse customer profiles.
Operations Manager | Suraksha Asset Reconstruction Ltd. Sep 2017 – Jan 2020
• Analysed financial health and recovery potential of NPA accounts offered for sale by scheduled commercial banks,
assessing credit risk and resolution feasibility for portfolios consisting of Large Corporates.
• Supported acquisition of a stressed account with debt of ~₹9,000 Cr under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code
(IBC), coordinating between bank officials, legal counsel, and management.
• Conducted due diligence and loan documentation for cases exceeding ₹50 Cr, ensuring compliance with regulatory
requirements and internal credit policies.
EXPERIENCE .
Consultant | Tata Trusts May 2017 – Sep 2017
• Deployed field operations across Maharashtra, establishing a network of extension officers (BRCs & CRCs) to
accelerate MIS data entry; shifted region from last to 9th position in IHHL count within 2 months.
• Initiated partnership with Rotary Club to build handwash stations in 1,200 government schools, improving
community hygiene outcomes through structured stakeholder engagement and programme management.
Research Consultant | Dexter Consultancy May 2016 – Jun 2016
• Conducted primary research across ~100 potential customers (3 categories) for an electric bike project, generating
insights that drove design selection; assessed online trading viability across ~25 retail stores, contributing to channel
strategy.
• Researched and analysed feasibility of 2 projects across Pune, resulting in selection of 1 project for execution based
on structured viability assessment.
PROJECTS .
AI-Powered Credit Intelligence Platform
• Identified the problem: CAM preparation for a single borrower takes 4–6 hours of analyst time due to manual
extraction of financials from annual reports. Defined the product vision, scoped the MVP, and mapped user
journeys for relationship managers and credit analysts as primary personas.
• Drove end-to-end product delivery — from requirements definition and LLM prompt design for financial data
extraction, to overseeing UI/UX, validating output accuracy against real CAMs, and iterating based on self-testing
across live banking use cases. Shipped with multi-format exports (Excel & PDF) aligned to bank reporting
standards. Product Metric - Reduces CAM prep time from 4–6 hrs to under 1 hr
Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js 16, Supabase, Google Gemini API, Claude API, SQLite, OpenPyXL, PDFMiner, GitHub
AI Persona Interaction Platform
• Conceived and launched a B2C AI product serving 500+ monthly users; defined the product strategy, persona
taxonomy (350+ personas), monetisation model (freemium + Razorpay), and go-to-market approach — treating
each launch as a product sprint with defined KPIs for engagement and retention.
• Ran iterative product development cycles: prioritised the feature backlog (memory system, voice cloning, mobile
UI, real-time news awareness), wrote user stories, validated with self-testing and early user feedback, and shipped
incremental releases — owning the full product lifecycle from ideation to live deployment on Vercel.
Tech Stack: Next.js 14, Supabase, Google Gemini 1.5 Flash, Groq Llama 3.3 70B, Vercel, Google OAuth, Tailwind CSS, Sarvam
Automated Multi-Portal Job Discovery
• Defined the product as a solution to a personal pain point: noise and inefficiency in manual job searching across
fragmented portals. Designed the end-to-end user experience — preference configuration, AI-driven relevance
scoring (0–100), daily email digest with relevant jobs and hiring manager LinkedIn details— prioritising zero-
friction daily use.
• Validated product-market fit through self-use and iterated on the scoring model, digest layout, and portal coverage
based on real output quality; shipped a web dashboard for settings management and digest history, treating each
iteration as a product release with defined success criteria.
Tech Stack: Python, Flask, Ollama/Mistral, Selenium, SQLite, APScheduler, Telegram Bot API, BeautifulSoup
EDUCATION .
PGPM (MBA Equivalent) — IIM Sirmaur Aug 2015 – Apr 2017
B.E. – Electronics & Telecommunication — University of Pune Aug 2010 – Apr 2014
CERTIFICATIONS .
IBM AI Product Management (Coursera) Jun 2025
Product Management Certification (HelloPM) Oct 2025
Agile Foundations (PMI) May 2025
